name_en: 24K relief box bag with water diamonds ⭐️⭐️ Different happiness! Classic styles are coming out one after another, the box bag is somewhat familiar~ C, how can the classic box bag be absent? "+ The faces of this new arrival are somewhat familiar, it is also the return of a classic model. One is the classic box bag, the chain is decorated with carved diamonds 💍, combining leisure and versatility, and also has a different freshness. The multi-pocket design creates a stronger sense of layering, making a big innovation on the single shape of the box, like a combination of a box bag and a camera bag, full of personality. Model A Dimensions: 10-17-8 With packaging
